name: chain_built_my_mvp_in_5_hours_and_got_to_10k_
method: built my MVP in 5 hours and got to $10k MRR in two months

stages.task: Scan HN Show/Ask, Reddit r/SaaS r/indiehackers for unmet pain points with 10+ upvotes and no good existing tool
Score each opportunity: automatable? <5hr build? monetizable? existing competition weak? Filter to top 3
Generate PRD, scaffold MVP using app factory templates + Claude coding, deploy
Cold outreach to original complainers, track signups, report week-1 metrics
